title: Process for Selecting One Full Question from Each Module
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for a student to select a single comprehensive question from each module in a Mobile Application Development course.
elements: Apply Selection Criteria (e.g., interest, complexity, relevance)
relationships: Process flow from Start to Review
Branches from Review to Evaluate for each module
Decision point from Evaluate to Apply Criteria
Selection made from Apply Criteria to Make Final Selection
